title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices used in the Cardiovascular System Agenda June 17, 2021 - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices used in the Cardiovascular System Agenda June 17, 2021
Location: Virtual Date & Time: June 17, 2021, 1:00 pm – 4:00 pm EST Participants: SAC-MDUCS members, guest speakers, Health Canada staff
1:00 – 1:10 Opening remarks David Boudreau (Director General, Medical Devices Directorate (MDD))
1:10 – 1:20 Review of the agenda and declaration of affiliations and interests Dr. John Ducas (Chair)
1:20 – 2:05 Renal denervation in the management of hypertension: Second time around Dr. Ross Feldman (guest speaker) Renal sympathetic denervation for treatment of hypertension post
  Symplicity HTN-3 trial Dr. Marcel Ruzicka (guest speaker)
2:15 - 2:45 Does carotid baroreceptor stimulation have a place in the management of
  resistant hypertension and heart failure? Dr. David Spence (guest speaker)
2:45 – 3:55 Clinical evidence requirements, clinical trial design, and patient
  population: Discussion from clinical and patient perspectives Directed by Ben Elliott
  (Health Canada) and Dr. Ducas (Chair)
3:55 – 4:00 Next steps, closing remarks and adjournment of meeting Dr. John Ducas (Chair)
